description: A plain candid field-arrest photograph with no graphic design. In front of a 'Walgreens drive thru pharmacy' sign and a parking lot, two masked ICE officers in tactical vests marked 'POLICE' (one in a green shirt, one in a gray plaid shirt, both armed with sidearms) detain a man in a white-and-blue checked shirt and jeans, handcuffing him against an open car door. The bright daylight scene includes parked cars and utility lines. The tweet attributes it to the weeklong Harlingen, Texas enforcement operation (72 arrests). This is a documentary operation snapshot, not a designed meme.
